runs.brief_en: Elon Musk sharply criticized Rep. Ro Khanna over DOGE/USAID cuts, calling him an 'evil liar' and 'Ro the Robber', accusing fraud and insider trading while defending DOGE's verification standards and suggesting lawsuits or prison. He affirmed 'McCarthy was right' on denaturalizing terrorists and that media's 'White Supremacy' surge is manufactured anti-white racism. Tesla amplified strong FSD v14+ user feedback.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克猛烈反擊眾議員Ro Khanna在DOGE/USAID削減議題上，稱其為「邪惡的騙子」和「搶劫的Ro」，指控詐欺與內線交易，捍衛DOGE驗證標準並建議訴訟或入獄。他肯定「麥卡錫是對的」（關於剝奪恐怖分子公民權），並指媒體「白人至上」使用量激增是製造的反白人種族主義。Tesla分享FSD v14+強力用戶正面反饋。

runs.brief_en: Elon Musk escalated attacks on Rep. Ro Khanna over DOGE/USAID, calling him 'Robber Khanna' and demanding prison while defending aid verification standards. He replied 'Execution' supporting death penalty in a UK child sex abuse case and 'Wow' to Sam Altman/Worldcoin probes. Other posts addressed media 'white supremacy' narratives, McCarthy-era loyalty laws, and Tesla amplified positive FSD user feedback.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克升級抨擊Ro Khanna議員，稱「Robber Khanna」並要求入獄，捍衛援助查核標準；對英國兒童性犯罪案回「Execution」支持死刑，對Altman Worldcoin調查回「Wow」。另有媒體「白人至上」論述、麥卡錫公民權議題，特斯拉轉發FSD用戶正面體驗。

runs.brief_en: Elon Musk escalated attacks on Rep. Ro Khanna ('Ro the Robber' belongs in prison) over DOGE/USAID oversight and defended basic aid verification. He said 'Execution' for UK child sex offenders, 'True' on media white supremacy inflation, 'McCarthy was right' on citizenship for terrorists, 'Wow' to Worldcoin internal probes. Tesla shared FSD as 'black and white to color TV'.
runs.brief_zh: Elon Musk 強批 Ro Khanna 為強盜應入獄，捍衛 DOGE 援助查核；另回「Execution」、「True」、「McCarthy was right」、「Wow」Worldcoin；Tesla 推 FSD 好評。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Escalates Attacks on Rep. Ro Khanna, Calls Him 'Robber' and Demands Prison Over DOGE/USAID
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk 升級抨擊議員 Ro Khanna，稱其為「強盜」並要求因 DOGE/USAID 入獄
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk sharply escalated his criticism of Rep. Ro Khanna regarding DOGE's oversight of USAID throughout the day. He labeled Khanna 'Ro the Robber,' stated 'Robber Khanna should be in prison' and 'Time to sue this liar.' Musk defended DOGE's simple standard of requiring contact information to verify aid recipients and prevent fraud, noting multiple USAID officials pleaded guilty to stealing funds. He agreed with posts calling for Khanna's arrest.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 今日持續升級對議員 Ro Khanna 的批評，針對 DOGE 對 USAID 的監督。他稱 Khanna 為「Ro the Robber」，表示「Robber Khanna should be in prison」並「Time to sue this liar」。Musk 捍衛 DOGE 要求提供援助接受者聯絡資訊以驗證資金用途的簡單標準，並指出多名 USAID 官員已認罪偷竊資金。他同意要求逮捕 Khanna 的貼文。
items_flat.musk_quote: The standard applied by DOGE was very simple and easy: Provide contact information for the recipients of aid, so that we can confirm it is not fraudulent. The reality is that money was being sent to corrupt politicians under the guise of aid! Liars and stock insider traders like Ro the Robber should be in prison!!
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: DOGE 採用的標準非常簡單且容易：提供援助接受者的聯絡資訊，以便我們確認這不是詐欺。現實情況是，錢在援助的名義下被送給了腐敗的政客！像 Ro the Robber 這樣的騙子和股票內線交易者應該入獄！！

links.label: Elon Musk on X: Robber Khanna should be in prison
Elon Musk defends DOGE aid verification standard
Elon Musk on X (Time to sue this liar)
Elon Musk on X (He’s such an evil liar)

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Replies 'Execution' Supporting Death Penalty in UK Child Sex Abuse Case
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk 回覆「Execution」支持英國兒童性侵案死刑
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'Execution' to a post detailing charges against two UK men for multiple counts of sexual activity with a child, paying for sexual services of a child, and sex trafficking. The original post requested the death penalty for such offenders.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 回覆「Execution」給一則貼文，該貼文詳述兩名英國男子被控多項與兒童發生性行為、支付兒童性服務及人口販運罪名。原貼文要求對此類罪犯判處死刑。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk: Massive Rise in Media 'White Supremacy' Term is Manufactured Leftist Anti-White Racism
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk：媒體「白人至上」用語激增是左派製造的反白人種族主義
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'True' to analysis showing explosive increases in media usage of the term 'White Supremacy' (e.g., LA Times up 9749% from 2010-2020, with similar spikes at NYT, WaPo, WSJ). He agreed it was not organic but a Leftist creation to push anti-white racism.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 回覆「True」給一則分析，顯示媒體「White Supremacy」用語爆炸性增加（如 LA Times 2010-2020 年增長 9749%，NYT、WaPo、WSJ 也有類似激增）。他同意這非自然現象，而是左派為推動反白人種族主義而製造。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk: 'McCarthy Was Right' on Stripping Citizenship from Those Joining Terrorist Groups
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk：「McCarthy Was Right」支持剝奪加入恐怖組織者的公民權
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'McCarthy was right' to a post praising DOJ use of a 1952 law to denaturalize a Somali citizen who joined al-Shabaab terrorists months after naturalization. He supported enforcing loyalty standards and rejecting 'McCarthyism' smears.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 回覆「McCarthy was right」給一則貼文，該貼文讚揚司法部使用 1952 年法律，剝奪一名索馬利公民入籍數月後加入 al-Shabaab 恐怖組織的國籍。他支持執行忠誠標準，並拒絕「麥卡錫主義」抹黑。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Reacts 'Wow' to Internal Probes at Sam Altman's Worldcoin/Orb
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk 對 Sam Altman 的 Worldcoin/Orb 內部調查回覆「Wow」
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'Wow' to a report on internal investigations at Sam Altman's Orb startup (Worldcoin) for financial irregularities, bribery of foreign officials in Thailand, and ties to an individual accused of transnational cyber-fraud.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 對一則報導回覆「Wow」，該報導指出 Sam Altman 的 Orb 初創公司（Worldcoin）因財務不當、賄賂泰國外國官員，以及與一名被控跨國網路詐欺者的關聯而進行內部調查。

items_flat.title_en: Tesla Amplifies User Praise: FSD Supervised 'Like Going from Black and White to Color TV'
items_flat.title_zh: Tesla 轉發用戶讚譽：FSD Supervised「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」
items_flat.summary_en: Tesla quoted a user describing FSD Supervised v14+ as transformative after long road trips and daily use: 'it’s like going from black and white to color TV.' When driving a regular car again, even a 'better' one, the user felt they were 'driving dumb'.
items_flat.summary_zh: Tesla 轉發用戶描述 FSD Supervised v14+ 在長途旅行和日常使用後具有變革性：「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」。當再次駕駛一般汽車（即使是「更好」的車）時，用戶感覺自己「像個傻瓜在開車」。

tesla.title_en: Tesla Amplifies User Praise: FSD Supervised 'Like Going from Black and White to Color TV'
tesla.title_zh: Tesla 轉發用戶讚譽：FSD Supervised「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」
tesla.summary_en: Tesla quoted a user describing FSD Supervised v14+ as transformative after long road trips and daily use: 'it’s like going from black and white to color TV.' When driving a regular car again, even a 'better' one, the user felt they were 'driving dumb'.

brief_en: Elon Musk escalated attacks on Rep. Ro Khanna ('Ro the Robber' belongs in prison) over DOGE/USAID oversight and defended basic aid verification. He said 'Execution' for UK child sex offenders, 'True' on media white supremacy inflation, 'McCarthy was right' on citizenship for terrorists, 'Wow' to Worldcoin internal probes. Tesla shared FSD as 'black and white to color TV'.
